expectations.evidence: report.html exists and contains a complete HTML document (172 lines) with audit findings.
report.csv exists with a header row and 14 data rows covering issues from both files.

expectations.text: Report contains accessibility section (Section A / 접근성)
expectations.evidence: No dedicated 'Section A' or '접근성' section exists. Accessibility appears only as a category label within per-file tables. Issues are organized by file, not by audit section.

expectations.text: Report contains SEO & Web Performance section (Section B)
expectations.evidence: No dedicated 'Section B' grouping exists. SEO and Performance appear only as category labels within per-file issue tables.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
expectations.evidence: Only 4 accessibility issues are reported (missing alt, no landmarks, duplicate id, non-keyboard-accessible div). There is no systematic checklist evaluation of all 33 KWCAG2.2 items; no KWCAG item IDs appear anywhere.

expectations.text: All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: Only 3 SEO-related issues are mentioned (missing meta description, no JSON-LD, generic title). No SEO-01 through SEO-11 identifiers appear in the report.

expectations.text: All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: Only 4 performance issues are listed (render-blocking CSS, font-display, missing dimensions, inline script). No WP-01 through WP-18 identifiers appear in the report.

expectations.text: Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
expectations.evidence: Every issue row includes file name, line number(s), severity, category, detailed description, and recommendation. E.g., 'index.html line 30: missing alt attribute (logo.png)'.

expectations.text: Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
expectations.evidence: Each issue has a 'Recommendation' column with brief fix suggestions, but there is no dedicated 'Fix guide' section with concrete code examples or step-by-step remediation instructions.
The entire report is written in English. The HTML lang attribute is set to 'ko' but all content (headings, labels, issue descriptions, recommendations) is in English.

expectations.text: Only index.html and Card.tsx are reviewed (no dashboard.tsx)
expectations.evidence: The report contains exactly two file sections: 'features/web-sample/pages/index.html' and 'features/web-sample/components/Card.tsx'. No mention of dashboard.tsx anywhere.
